query:
INSERT INTO island_guides (placeId, name, slug, contentType, atoll, overview, published, featured, displayOrder)
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  LOWER(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(p.name, ' ', '-'), '.', ''), '''', '')),
  'island',
  a.name,
  CONCAT(p.name, ' is a beautiful island in ', a.name, '.'),
  1,
  0,
  0
FROM places p
JOIN atolls a ON p.atollId = a.id
LEFT JOIN island_guides ig ON p.name = ig.name
WHERE p.type = 'island' AND ig.id IS NULL;
